title: Assign every output on every path
description: In always_comb, assign all outputs on all branches so synthesis infers pure combinational logic instead of an unintended latch.
body: Use when writing combinational logic with if/case. Do not leave an output unassigned on some branch, and do not use incomplete case without a default. Actions: give every output a default assignment at the top of always_comb, or assign it in every branch; inspect synthesis output for inferred-latch warnings. Validation signals include a lint/synthesis pass with zero inferred latches and matching pre/post-synth simulation. Risk boundary: an inferred latch silently holds stale data and breaks timing; treat any latch-inference warning on a combinational block as a defect.
